name: neorag
description: SPT NeoRAG by Sponge Theory — enterprise RAG (knowledge bases, document ingestion, semantic + knowledge-graph retrieval) directly in Claude Code, via your NeoRAG instance.

base_url.title: NeoRAG instance URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your NeoRAG instance (cloud or self-host), without /mcp — e.g. https://rag.sponge-theory.dev

api_key.title: NeoRAG API key
api_key.description: A NeoRAG API key, created in the API Keys section of your NeoRAG instance. Shown once at creation.
